column displaying appointment titles

toString() - Method in class com.ogborn.c868final.Model.Contact
exports the contact name for use in a dropdown if we don't implement a toString() then our combobox will show junk
toString() - Method in class com.ogborn.c868final.Model.Country
Returns the country's name as its string representation.
toString() - Method in class com.ogborn.c868final.Model.Customer
used to return the customer name for use in a combobox
toString() - Method in class com.ogborn.c868final.Model.Division
Returns the division's name as its string representation.
toString() - Method in class com.ogborn.c868final.Model.User
Returns the username as the string representation of the user.

Tab displaying the customer breakdown.
